svg.title: VendorHub workflow diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end workflow showing vendor registration, application, review, booth assignment, invoicing, and check-in for a fair vendor management system

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the VendorHub registration step')
sendPrompt('How does email verification work in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the booth application form in VendorHub')
sendPrompt('What documents does a vendor need to upload in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a vendor submits their application in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does staff review vendor applications in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does staff verify vendor documents in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a VendorHub application is rejected?')
sendPrompt('How does booth assignment work in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does invoicing work in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does a vendor pay their invoice in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does staff confirm payment in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('What confirmation does a vendor receive after payment in VendorHub?')
sendPrompt('How does vendor check-in work at the event in VendorHub?')
